title: Nordale Signal Mod
description: Signalling equipment for Nordale, build posts and mount signals.
body:
Signals Mod for Nordale containing several signals used.
uploaded here to be available for anyone.
intended for use with the Immersive Railroading mod. but not mandatory.

the following is in the mod:
posts:
- Wooden post (with backplate available)
- Lattice Post (with backplate available)
- Rail Post (with backplate available)
- Tubular Steel Post
- Lattice Gantry (with both wooden and lattice post compatability)
signals:
- Upper Quadrant Home
- Lower Quadrant Home
- Upper Quadrant Distant
- Lower Quadrant Distant
- Shunt Disk
- SLJR Lower Quadrant Ground Shunt
- LNWR Lower Quadrant Shunt
- Upper Quadrant reduced Size Signal
- Upper Quadrant Calling on Arm
- Upper Quadrant Ringed signal
- Upper Quadrant Goods Loop Signal
- Colour Light Shunt Signal
- 2 Aspect Colour Light Signal
- Colour Light Feather
in addition the following other bits are available:
- Points Motor
- Points lever
- Whistle Post

To construct a signal:
1. build the post up to the desired height
2. place controller box in signal box, with redstone on/of control (e.g. lever on controller box)
2. place signal on the front of the post (exception note: put colour light ontop of the post)
3. right click signal with signal cable
4. place signal cable in controller box
5. operate signal by powering controller box with the redstone.
